features.name: Car Dealerships
features.display: §6§lEngine check!§r §eYour wallet is looking healthy—why not cruise by a Gramados dealership and hunt for your next dream ride?
features.description: §7Dealership stock changes often, so a quick visit can reveal something new. §bIf you've got the budget, go take a look.

features.name: Mafia rep purchase
features.display: §4§lCareful...§r §cThe mafia is not exactly your biggest fan right now. Maybe a little "tribute" could smooth things over?
features.description: §7If your mafia reputation is rough, ask around §6Dominico's Pizza §7in Siloroz. §eSome problems can be... negotiated.

quests.name: Weapon Permit Quest
quests.display: §9§lReady for responsibility?§r §bA long and challenging journey can earn you a weapon permit, unlocking gun shops and more.
quests.description: §7Interested? Start by asking at §3Gramados Town Hall§7 and follow the official process.

quests.name: Under Pressure
quests.display: §d§lA baker's plea awaits!§r §5Dive into Trin lore, old stories, and strange clues in a heartfelt journey of flour and friendship.
quests.description: §7Visit §6Moulin-Fournelet §7in Trilnat and talk to the baker to begin.

quests.name: Insecticide
quests.display: §2§lGreen thumbs wanted!§r §aA community garden is under siege by pests—can you save this season's harvest?
quests.description: §7Look for the communal garden in §aSiloroz§7 if you want a hands-on local quest.

quests.name: A Fountain Once Lost
quests.display: §b§lSilence in Caldero...§r §3The legendary fountain has gone quiet. If you're handy with tools, its voice may yet return.
quests.description: §7Check the §b'Fuente de los Ecos' §7in Caldero to discover what happened.

quests.name: The Sand from Crystal Cove
quests.display: §b§lA glimmering errand awaits!§r §3A glass artisan in Rivermarch seeks rare crystal sand from a hidden dune far across Feldpard.
quests.description: §7Speak with §dMaëline Courbe §7at the §6Atelier de la Verrière§7 to hear about a special trip.

quests.name: Pieces of What Remains
quests.display: §8§lDrabus remembers...§r §7An old mechanic named Marcel needs help piecing together more than just a broken station wagon.
quests.description: §7Find §8Marcel §7in Drabus Strip if you're in the mood for a slower, story-driven quest.

quests.name: Valencian Fire Zest
quests.display: §6§lTaste test challenge!§r §eA hyper-energetic teen in Citrus Alley dares you to try Café Valencia's legendary drink.
quests.description: §7Chat with §dMira Ventroli §7in Citrus Alley for a quick food-and-drink themed challenge.

quests.name: Old Seagull Road Restorer
quests.display: §e§lRestoration call!§r §6Tomás Ravel is rebuilding a storm-damaged historic home and needs a hand preserving Old Seagull Road's legacy.
quests.description: §7Meet §eTomás Ravel §7near Old Seagull Road if you want repeatable restoration work.

quests.name: Starter Jobs Discovery Tour
quests.display: §a§lNew in town?§r §2Take the starter jobs tour to discover where to begin earning your first income.
quests.description: §7Talk to the Hiring Manager near the §aGramados Town Hall §7 and ask for the trip to starter jobs.
